base_llm.summary: Baseline LLM without retrieval. Struggles with grounding answers in specific document content.

single_agent_rag.summary: Document retrieval + answer generation. Significantly improves faithfulness (+211% vs Base) through retrieval-augmentation.

multi_agent_rag.summary: Full multi-agent orchestrator with intelligent routing. Provides selective retrieval based on query analysis.

improvement_analysis.key_insight: Single-Agent RAG achieves best balance of faithfulness (0.56) and context precision (0.96), proving RAG effectiveness for document Q&A.

findings.1_faithfulness: RAG systems significantly outperform base LLM by grounding answers in retrieved documents
findings.2_context_precision: Single-Agent RAG retrieved highest quality chunks (0.96), demonstrating strong retrieval relevance
findings.3_overall_strategy: Single-Agent RAG provides optimal trade-off: high faithfulness + high precision for production use

recommendations.for_production: Deploy Single-Agent RAG for reliable document Q&A
recommendations.for_multi_agent: Multi-agent routing is beneficial for mixed-type queries but may reduce precision on document-only questions
recommendations.for_improvement: Integrate official RAGAS metrics library for production benchmarking
